items.title: Solana whales add $9.7M in SOL – Can bulls now push past $87?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased whale activity in Solana, with $9.7M added, could signal bullish momentum, potentially impacting SOL's price trajectory.

items.title: Polymarket aims for prediction market approval in Japan by 2030
items.whyYouShouldCare: Polymarket's push for prediction market approval in Japan could expand Solana's ecosystem and enhance its use cases in the Asian market.

items.title: Jito jumps 30% after strong quarterly report – Can JTO reclaim $0.70?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's 30% surge following a strong quarterly report indicates growing confidence in its performance, which may positively influence SOL's ecosystem.
